{{Infobox location
| name = Orgrith Cave
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Orgrith Cave is a dangerous location situated in the southeastern corner of the [[Latari Forest]]. The site exerts a corrupting influence on its surroundings, causing nearby vegetation to wither and the soil to turn into sand. The cave was formed during a violent conflict involving [[Tartarus]], [[Naraka]], and [[Ornheim Travelers]]; because of this origin, the internal caverns are known to shift their shape constantly. Physically, the cave is marked by a large, irregular stone dome that rises from flat ground. While its entrance is wide enough to accommodate many people, the interior contains treacherous elements, including summoned beasts made of flame, [[steel]], or rock. The cave's history is tied to a significant battle that served as both an ending and a beginning.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Situated in the southeastern corner of the [[Latari Forest]], Orgrith Cave was originally created during a chaotic and terrible battle involving [[Tartarus]], [[Naraka]], and the [[Ornheim Travelers]]. The site serves as the designated location for the graduation ritual. While [[Simon]] had previously entered the cave, it is also a place where [[Andra]] and [[Lycus]] may have become trapped.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orgrith Cave]] is the location for the graduation ritual.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orgrith Cave]] is located at the southeastern corner of the [[Latari Forest]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orgrith Cave]] was formed by a long and terrible battle.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orgrith Cave]] was formed in a chaotic battle between [[Tartarus]], [[Naraka]], and [[Ornheim Travelers]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] had previously entered [[Orgrith Cave]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Orgrith Cave]] is a place where [[Andra]] and [[Lycus]] might have been trapped.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] previously called all his [[steel]] in [[Orgrith Cave]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Orgrith Cave," he said at last. "Seven nights in Orgrith Cave."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
